design_principles.principle: Make agent changes legible before they land.
design_principles.rationale: Visibility is what lets users stay accountable without micromanaging.
design_principles.mental_model_connection: Users assume they will see changes first.

opportunity_areas.underlying_need: When I delegate to an agent, I need to see what changed so I can stay accountable.
opportunity_areas.desired_state: A diff is surfaced before approval.
design_questions: What granularity of diff feels like enough?

risk_areas.risk: Users may trust a done status without verifying.

research_questions.question: Does a pre-approval diff reduce manual verification?
